candidates.why: A single operating-level depreciation line appears separately above EBIT and alongside the selected COGS rows ('Rig operating expenses' and 'Reimbursable expenses'), so it does not appear embedded within those selected rows. In this drilling contractor context, the separate depreciation line most plausibly relates primarily to operating assets used in service delivery, so it should be added separately to the COGS bucket.

variables.notes: OK. Only one undifferentiated operating depreciation row is shown. To avoid double counting, assign the separate depreciation line to COGS_DA rather than also to XSGA_DA.

candidates.why: Although depreciation is a separate operating line, it is undifferentiated and not specifically labelled as administrative or SG&A-related. Because the same row is being used for COGS_DA, adding it here as well would double count.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A-specific depreciation/amortisation row is visible. 'Administrative Expenses' appears to be the selected SG&A bucket, and the standalone 'Depreciation' line should not be added to XSGA_DA as well.
